title: OpenRouter Fusion: They OFFICIALLY CLAIM THAT THIS MODEL beats FABLE?
summary: OpenRouter launched Fusion API, which orchestrates prompts to multiple models in parallel and uses a judge model to aggregate results. The creators claim Fable-level performance at lower cost, but practical testing shows inconsistent results across coding, math, and SVG tasks.
writeup: The video examines OpenRouter's Fusion API, which sends a prompt to multiple models in parallel and uses a judge model to aggregate their outputs into a single response. OpenRouter claims this orchestration reaches Fable-level performance at lower cost, a claim the video tests directly. Hands-on trials across coding, math, and SVG tasks show inconsistent results, undercutting the marketed parity. The takeaway: ensemble routing with a judge aggregator is the mechanism behind Fusion, and its real-world quality does not reliably match the stated benchmark.
